overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action RPG showing a character exploring a snow-covered tribal village at night. The character moves through the settlement past wooden huts and torch-lit paths, eventually approaching a campfire gathering. The scene features high-quality game engine graphics with dramatic lighting from moonlight and fire sources.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal hut exterior with carved wooden pillars

events.description: character turns away from hut and begins walking down the path

agents.ego_description: character turns away from the wooden hut and begins walking along the snow-covered path

entered.detail: small wooden hut with thatched roof and carved decorations
tall wooden totem pole with blue glowing carvings
snow-dusted ground with patches of grass visible
rocky outcrop forming a natural wall along the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character standing before a small tribal hut adorned with carved wooden pillars. The character turns and begins walking along a narrow snow-covered path bordered by stone walls, moving away from the hut into the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: torch-lit village path with stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the path lined with burning torches

entered.detail: wooden post with burning flame providing warm orange light
large wooden longhouse structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a medium-width path lined with stone walls and illuminated by torch posts. The large longhouse becomes visible in the distance ahead as the character moves forward through the snowy village.

scene_state.functional_zone: village longhouse with outdoor seating and cooking areas

agents.ego_description: passing by the large longhouse and moving through the village center

entered.detail: large wooden meeting hall with multiple levels and decorated beams
long wooden tables and benches arranged outside the longhouse
smoldering fire pit with cooking implements nearby

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the village's large longhouse, which features outdoor wooden seating and cooking areas. The path widens as the character moves through the central village area, with various smaller huts becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: village campfire gathering area with seated villagers

events.description: approaching the warm light of the large campfire, lighting becomes warmer
character slows and stops near the campfire where villagers are gathered

agents.ego_description: approaching the campfire and stopping to observe the gathered villagers

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on the ground near the campfire
villager sitting by the fire facing the flames

entered.detail: large bonfire with bright flames surrounded by sitting logs
cut logs arranged as seating around the fire pit

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a gathering area centered around a large campfire, where several villagers are seated on wooden stumps. The lighting shifts to a warmer glow from the fire as the character stops near the group, completing the journey through the village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy tribal village that transitions from a quiet residential perimeter to a warm, communal gathering center. It begins before a small hut with carved wooden pillars, moving away from the structure and along a narrow, snow-covered path bordered by stone walls. As the character advances, the path is illuminated by torch posts and opens up to reveal a large longhouse in the distance. The scene then expands as the camera passes the longhouse and its outdoor cooking areas, moving through the central village square where various smaller huts line the widening way. Finally, the lighting shifts from the cool moonlight to a warm, flickering glow as the character approaches a large campfire surrounded by villagers seated on wooden stumps.
